name: Mushroom Veg Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and quarter the fresh mushrooms. Cut celery and carrots into 1/2 inch pieces.
2. Place oil in a large pot. Add chopped onions; cook over low heat for about 10 minutes until wilted.
3. Add garlic, thyme, and bay leaf to the pot.
4. Add mushrooms and cook for 20 minutes over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
5. Add barley, celery, carrots, and broth to the pot. Season with salt and pepper to taste, as well as nutmeg.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to medium low and simmer for 25 to 30 minutes or until barley and vegetables are tender.
7. Skim off any foam that rises to the top of the soup.
8. Remove the bay leaf before serving the soup piping hot.
9. Stir in parsley just before serving.
